options.a: Airflow that causes random deviations from the desired flight path which need immediate corrective action.
options.b: A fluctuating wind situation where the horizontal wind component is subject to long-lasting gusts and lulls.
options.c: Variations in the vector wind along an aircraft’s flight path which are encountered at low altitude.
options.d: Prolonged oscillations in the wind over a large expanse of smooth ground.
